NIBSDescription: ccPAS: PMv pulse (Coil_1) then M1 pulse (Coil_2) 8 ms later, 100 pairs at 0.2 Hz. The two coils are listed as a |-delimited element_id, aligned to the two pulses of pattern1.

ElementSet.Description: Coil over left ventral premotor cortex (PMv); fires first (pattern1 pulse 1).
Coil over left M1; fires 8 ms later (pattern1 pulse 2).

IntensitySet.MeasurementMethod: EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous
EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous

event_id.Description: Identifier of a stimulation event type. Linked to event_id in *_events.tsv. MUST be unique within this file.

element_id.Description: The two coils, in pattern1 pulse order. Links to ElementSet.ElementID.

stimulus_shape.Description: Waveform shape of the base stimulus.

Levels.Biphasic: Biphasic pulse as per stimulator setting

first_inflection.Description: Direction of the first induced-current deflection.

stimulus_intensity.Description: n/a here; per-pulse values are in pattern1_intensity.

pattern1_count.Description: Number of base stimuli in one pattern1 unit (the pair).

pattern1_interval.Description: Onset-to-onset interval between the two pulses (Coil_1 then Coil_2).

pattern1_intensity.Description: Amplitude of each pulse, in element order (Coil_1, Coil_2). Length equals pattern1_count.

intensity_reference.Description: Anchor per pulse, in element order. Links to IntensitySet.IntensityID.

intensity_scaling.Description: Multiplier on the reference, or 'absolute'. Aligned to intensity_reference.
